Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are given a complex process description and need to construct a process tree using the operators and notation provided

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The patient begins with Arrival A and then Registration RG and Intake Assessment IA in sequence So A then RG then IA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After intake the triage team evaluation Triage Interview TI and then Triage Classification TC in sequence

Name: Validation - IND
Text: But note that step 2 is after step 1 So we have a sequence of step 1 and step 2

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: However to avoid too many nested sequences we can flatten

Name: Validation - PE
Text: But the notation allows binary operators only So we have to represent the sequence as a binary tree of sequences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After triage classification there is an exclusive choice between Comprehensive ECG CE and Full Blood Panel FBP So X CE FBP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: And note that this exclusive choice comes after the triage classification So we have a sequence of the previous steps and then the exclusive choice

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Then after the initial diagnostic test we have a loop if the results are abnormal

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop is described as After the test if abnormal then Specialist Consultation SC Then an exclusive choice between Targeted Medication TM and Specialized Physical Therapy SPT Then a Re Diagnostic Test step which is an exclusive choice between Follow up ECG FCE and Follow up Blood Analysis FBA

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop operator in process trees is A B where A is the body and B is the redo part

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can think of the loop as The body of the loop is SC then treatment choice then retest

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can model the redo part as a silent step tau that represents the condition check and the decision to continue

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: But wait the loop is entered only if the initial test is abnormal However the process tree does not have a conditional operator

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So we have to model the entire process after the initial test as an exclusive choice between doing the loop and skipping it with a silent step

Name: Validation - PE
Text: After the initial test we have two possibilities The test is normal then we skip the loop and go to the next step Possibility 2 The test is abnormal then we enter the loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 4 True concurrency between AI and NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 5 Sequence of FAS and DDI

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The concurrency operator is binary So we have to represent the concurrency of three activities as a binary tree

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We can do BL in parallel with ICP in parallel with MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The sequence is S1 then S2 then optional loop then AI and NC then FAS and DDI then BL ICP and MRF

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The entire process tree in notation is sequence of initial steps then initial test then exclusive choice for loop or skip then parallel AI and NC then final administrative sequence and final parallel block

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must define LoopBody as SC then treatment choice then retest choice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Then create the activities Then create the operators Then build the tree step by step

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The process tree must be built with the ProcessTree objects and we must set the parent and children correctly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Build the sequence for A RG IA TI TC Build the exclusive choice between CE and FBP Build the loop body Build the loop Build the exclusive choice after the initial test Build the concurrency for AI and NC Build the sequence for FAS and DDI Build the concurrency for BL ICP MRF Build the main sequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop operator means do the body then either exit or do the silent step and repeat This matches the description after the re diagnostic test if the results are still abnormal the patient returns to the Specialist Consultation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: And the exclusive choice after the initial test models the condition that if the initial test is normal we skip the loop This is a valid model
